home.title: Reports — Analytics
home.description: Wave 1: revenue, shifts, goods receipt, supplier payables, stock, and expiry alerts. Pick a report to filter by period, export CSV, or print.

view.emptyData: No data for the selected period
view.noResult: No results yet — click Run report

SALES-01.name: Revenue by period
SALES-01.description: Gross sales, returns, and net revenue by day/week/month (VN time).

SALES-02.name: Revenue by payment method
SALES-02.description: Net revenue by cash, card, bank transfer, and wallet.

SALES-03.name: Shift report
SALES-03.description: Shift list, cash float, and net revenue per shift.

PROC-03.name: Supplier payables (snapshot)
PROC-03.description: Outstanding balance and aging at view time.

INV-01.name: Stock & value
INV-01.description: On-hand quantity and value (qty × batch cost) by product/warehouse.

INV-02.name: Near expiry
INV-02.description: Batches expiring within the alert window.
